notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the xmlrpc-c SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 7 CVEs: CVE-2021-46143, CVE-2022-22822, CVE-2022-22823, CVE-2022-22824, CVE-2022-22825, and 2 more.
